name: DFIR Hunting Artifact Collection Dry Run
description: Report-only Roadmap T profile for DFIR hunting and artifact collection contracts. It does not collect files, read sensitive user artifacts, or export triage packages.

evidence_scope: triage package manifest, hash, and redaction contract
promotion_requires: executed collection artifact with per-endpoint success, errors, duration, and bytes collected
manifest with hashes, timestamps, host identity, query/profile version, and redaction state
searchable analyst results without raw database access
exported report or package linked to the hunt run id

claim_boundary: Dry-run DFIR hunting contract only. It makes Roadmap T scorecard-mappable without claiming live collection, hunting, evidence preservation, or analyst review readiness.

tests.name: Hunt Execution Manifest Report Only
tests.fallback_command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "[pscustomobject]@{ Capability='hunt_manifest'; RequiredFields=@('hunt_id','tenant_id','agent_ids','artifact_ids','query_version','started_at','finished_at','status','errors','bytes_collected'); Apply='planned_not_executed'; RuntimeEffect='none_report_only' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"

tests.name: Triage Package Manifest Report Only
tests.fallback_command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "[pscustomobject]@{ Capability='triage_package'; RequiredFields=@('package_id','hunt_id','host_identity','artifact_count','sha256_manifest','redaction_policy','chain_of_custody','created_at'); Export='planned_not_executed'; RuntimeEffect='none_report_only' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"

tests.name: Analyst Review Export Contract Report Only
tests.fallback_command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "[pscustomobject]@{ Capability='analyst_review'; RequiredSurfaces=@('search_results','saved_query','timeline','notebook_summary','exportable_report'); RawDatabaseAccessRequired=$false; RuntimeEffect='none_report_only' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"
